hero.title: Software, SaaS platforms and data workflows built for teams that need momentum.
hero.support: Nev Research designs, builds and supports practical digital products for founders, agencies and operations teams.

about.title: Practical SaaS delivery for teams that need reliable software.
about.body: Nev Research partners with clients to design, build and maintain software that supports real operations: product interfaces, backend workflows, data analysis, QA automation, reporting routines and long-term maintenance. We focus on clear scope, dependable delivery and systems that remain understandable after launch.

experience.title: Delivery proof across product, data and software teams.

skills.title: Connected skills maps
skills.technicalDescription: Frontend, backend, platform and tooling capabilities.
skills.deliveryDescription: Collaboration, ownership and cross-functional execution skills.
skills.upcomingDescription: Upcoming capability map for future R&D and product investments.
skills.upcomingBody: This map will activate in the next release.

calculator.title: Plan your product scope and delivery.
calculator.budgetNote: Set a working investment range to understand how much scope we can comfortably cover.
calculator.guidanceTitle: Not sure what to request yet?
calculator.guidanceBody: Tell us what you want to improve, launch, automate or understand. Nev Research can help shape the scope, recommend the right technical path, prioritize the first version and guide your project from idea to working software.
calculator.footnote: This estimate is directional and useful for scope conversations. Final pricing depends on product depth, integrations, revisions, and handoff expectations.

status.adjust: Scope or timeline should be adjusted

frontend.label: Frontend delivery
frontend.description: Interfaces, landing flows, dashboards, responsive UI and Angular or React product screens.

backend.label: Backend or APIs
backend.description: Node.js services, REST endpoints, integrations, authentication-ready flows and data contracts.

testing.label: Testing and QA
testing.description: Validation plans, Playwright or Selenium coverage, regression checks and release confidence.

maintenance.label: Maintenance support
maintenance.description: Bug fixes, small improvements, monitoring routines, documentation and product continuity.

dataAnalysis.label: Data analysis
dataAnalysis.description: SQL exploration, dataset cleanup, business questions, KPI review and practical insight delivery.

automation.label: Automation
automation.description: Python workflows, repetitive task removal, operational scripts and browser automation support.

etlScraping.label: ETL and web scraping
etlScraping.description: Extraction pipelines, transformations, structured datasets and reliable collection routines.

reporting.label: Reporting workflows
reporting.description: Dashboards, spreadsheet models, quality checks and recurring delivery-ready summaries.

team.title: People behind Nev Research delivery.
team.founderBio: Founder of Nev Research, focused on product architecture, frontend systems, client delivery, AI-assisted workflows, and long-term software quality.
team.engineerBio: Supports data analysis, Python automation, SQL workflows, QA validation, ETL routines, web scraping, and technical operations for SaaS clients.
